title: US computer-science enrolment just fell for the first time in 20 years
summary: In it, computer science’s share of enrolment fell for the first time in roughly two decades. The National Student Clearinghouse reported undergraduate computer-science enrolment at four-year colleges down 8.1% in autumn 2025.
